replies.msg:
https://hk.news.appledaily.com/local/20200403/WWWAAMK4BWBRF2GCI5GMGK6K3M/

去年反送中浪潮席捲各行各業，航空界在內地民用航空局施壓下，掀起連串「政治大清洗」，先後約40人疑被「以言入罪」解僱。在白色恐怖陰霾下，國泰內部近日再度掀起文革風氣，管理層昨宣佈推出全新匿名告密平台，外聘獨立服務供應商，系統化整個「篤灰」過程。「小報告」會由供應商送交國泰專責部門跟進，保證舉報人資料免於外洩，更可隨時登入平台補充資料和查核進度。工會批評，國泰在疫情和財困夾攻下，竟有餘力搞批鬥，「係咪又想諗計炒人？」，質疑舉報機制欠透明度，擔心再有員工無辜被針對。

Incident: Cathay Pacific B773 at Hong Kong on Mar 31st 2020, cleared for runway 07L crossed 07R and went around

A Cathay Pacific Boeing 777-300, registration B-KQM performing flight CX-252 (dep Mar 30th) from London Heathrow,EN (UK) to Hong Kong (China), was cleared for the ILS approach to runway 07L and followed the localizer. Descending through about 850 feet the aircraft began to turn right, deviated off the extended runway center line and initiated a go around at about 750 feet. The aircraft climbed on a heading of about 090 degrees (instead of 071 degrees), crossed the runway threshold 07R at about 2000 feet AGL and turned left onto a heading of about 059 degrees and climbed to 5000 feet being subsequently instructed to climb to 6000 feet. Upon query by ATC the crew reported the reason for their go around was an unstable approach. The crew reported they were ready for a second aproach and were vectored for a second ILS approach to runway 07L which concluded in a safe landing on runway 07L about 20 minutes after the go around.

The aircraft climbed on a heading of about 090 degrees (instead of 071 degrees), crossed the runway threshold 07R at about 2000 feet AGL and turned left onto a heading of about 059 degrees and climbed to 5000 feet being subsequently instructed to climb to 6000 feet. Upon query by ATC the crew reported the reason for their go around was an unstable approach. The crew reported they were ready for a second aproach and were vectored for a second ILS approach to runway 07L which concluded in a safe landing on runway 07L about 20 minutes after the go around.
